ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school the student attended */,
  "attending_university" TEXT /* Name of the university the student is attending */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL to the student's resume */,
  "personal_statement" TEXT /* URL to the student's personal statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "field_of_interest" TEXT /* Field of interest for the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money awarded for the scholarship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scholarship */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Additional eligibility criteria */,
  "application_form_url" TEXT /* URL to the application form */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the scholarship is renewable */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the scholarship is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who applied */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship being applied for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_form" TEXT /* Application form data */,
  "transcripts_url" TEXT /* URL to the student's transcripts */,
  "letters_of_recommendation_url" TEXT /* URL to the letters of recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship_id") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that was awarded */,
  "amount_awarded" REAL /* Amount of money awarded */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors_scholarships" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided by the sponsor */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id", "scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarship_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship */,
  "field_of_interest" TEXT /* Field of interest for the scholarship */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school required for the scholarship */,
  "attending_university" TEXT /* Name of the university required for the scholarship */,
  "min_gpa" REAL /* Minimum GPA requirement */,
  "min_test_score" INTEGER /* Minimum test score requirement */,
  "financial_need" INTEGER /* Indicates if financial need is a criterion */,
  "residency_requirement" INTEGER /* Indicates if residency is a criterion */,
  "extracurricular_activities" TEXT /* List of required extracurricular activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarship_criteria_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship_id") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, sponsor, admin) */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email is verified */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarship_deadlines" (
  "deadline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deadline */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Date of the deadline */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if a notification has been sent to students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deadline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarship_deadlines_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship_id") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the newsletter */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the newsletter */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the newsletter was sent */,
  "recipient_count" INTEGER /* Number of recipients */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Open rate of the newsletter */,
  "click_rate" REAL /* Click rate of the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the message */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been read */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL to any attachments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "donation_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "donation_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the donor's contributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)
